title: Kiss of the Death
overview: Within 3 days, Du must kiss An and take away her soul, or he'll face the most terrifying curse against Deaths. However, the naive Prince of Death was wooed by the hot-headed yet flirtatious An into saving her life multiple times. While trying to stay alive, An found something more important than life itself - love.
